tool.name: graphql_security_tester
tool.description: Test GraphQL endpoints for security vulnerabilities.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test nested query depth attacks (DoS) - Test batch/alias-based resource exhaustion - Test IDOR via GraphQL node/relay queries - Test for GraphQL injection vulnerabilities - Analyze endpoint security configuration

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - test_depth: Test nested query depth attacks - test_batch: Test batch/alias resource exhaustion - test_idor: Test IDOR via node queries - test_injection: Test injection vulnerabilities - analyze: Analyze security configuration

parameter.name: field
parameter.description: Field name for depth testing (default: user)

parameter.name: node_id
parameter.description: Node ID for IDOR testing. Required for test_idor.

parameter.name: alternative_ids
parameter.description: Comma-separated alternative IDs for IDOR testing

returns.description: GraphQL security test results with vulnerability indicators
